data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API endpoints or functionality that confirms the ability to simulate the persona scenario of requesting an exception through the proper channel. While the expected result mentions confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there is no supporting evidence that demonstrates this functionality is implemented or tested. Therefore, the validation of this exploratory step is inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoint or functionality for simulating the persona scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to simulate the persona scenario.
